_comment: audience-research maps content signals to the five-persona model and surfaces audience insights.
description: Audience profile mapped to the five-persona model from comments, engagement patterns, or provided analytics.

steps.condition: the request asks whether a specific product fits the audience

steps.input_from: missing data signals from steps 1 to 3

note: Never fabricate comment text or demographic data. Present niche-typical persona defaults as defaults, not as the creator's measured data.
